positive: A highly detailed, symmetrical emblem design featuring a mystical bioluminescent forest intersecting with cosmic nebula patterns. The main subject is a stylized circular mandala arrangement of interlocking, fantastical flora (e.g., glowing monstera leaves, stylized ferns) and geometric celestial elements (e.g., crescent moons, star clusters, ringed planets). Use a color palette dominated by deep midnight blue, vibrant neon teal, ethereal purple, and electric lime green. The style should be a seamless blend of Art Nouveau organic lines and Neo-geometric stained-glass aesthetics. The composition must be centered, featuring strong, clear silhouettes and high contrast against a dark background. Intricate line work, vector art quality, clean edges, decorative, suitable for screen printing.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, watermark, signature, text, words, cartoon, realism, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, poorly drawn, grainy, gradient fade, messy
